title: Create Event
subtitle: Fill out the form to create your SPOT event
connectSubtitle: You need to connect your wallet to create an event.

form.imageStorageNote: Images will be stored temporarily. For production, permanent storage (IPFS, Firebase, etc.) will be implemented
form.communityNote: You can create new communities in the Communities section.
form.privateNote: Private events will only be accessible via direct link or QR code.

notifications.requiredFieldsMsg: Please fill in all required fields
notifications.eventCreatedMsg: Your SPOT event is ready. Copy the detail if you need to resend the transaction.
notifications.createErrorMsg: Could not create the event. Copy the detail for support.

validation.invalidImage: Please select a valid image file

tldr.summary: Before filling out the form, make sure you have art, dates, and delivery methods ready.
tldr.bullet1Detail: Use human images and highlight key points.
tldr.bullet3Detail: Enable QR, link, code, geo, or NFC based on your audience.
